title: Payments API Latency Triage
summary: Use this runbook when payments latency rises or checkout timeouts increase across production traffic.
immediate_actions: Confirm recent deploys and rollback if a regression is suspected.
Check database connection saturation and queue backlog.
Rate-limit non-critical background jobs if customer flows are impacted.

title: Order Sync Backlog Containment
summary: Use this runbook for delayed order propagation, queue backlog, or partner integration slowness.
immediate_actions: Inspect queue depth and dead-letter counts.
Notify downstream integration owners about increased lag.

title: Authentication Service Production Outage
summary: Use this runbook when login failures affect broad customer traffic or the identity tier is unavailable.
immediate_actions: Confirm the blast radius across login, token refresh, and admin flows.
Fail over to the standby identity cluster if health checks fail.
Engage incident commander and customer communications lead.

title: Inventory Search Degradation
summary: Use this runbook when search results become stale, incomplete, or significantly slower.
immediate_actions: Check indexing lag and failed ingestion jobs.
Verify search cluster health and shard availability.
Re-route read traffic to the warm standby search cluster if required.
